system_metadata.title_mm: နေ့စဉ် ပြည်သူ့ အသိဉာဏ်ပညာ မနက်ခင်း ဖွဲ့စည်းပုံ
system_metadata.purpose: Daily civic intelligence gathering and reflection tool for leadership, NUG, PDF, civil society organizations, and community groups

morning_structure.tools: 6 mobile phones + any preferred AI (Grok, Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, etc.)
morning_structure.goal: Build collective understanding of current reality through diverse perspectives and Dharma-informed reflection

steps.description: Wiseman opens the session with calm greeting and sets the intention for clear seeing (Vipassana).
Each of the 6 participants shares one paragraph (compact) on today's world / national situation from media they followed.
Participants open their chosen AI and ask for one compact paragraph analysis or reflection on their input.
Participants send their AI paragraphs to the group. Wiseman compiles the 6 perspectives.
Wiseman adds Final Morning Reflection, connecting inputs to Dharma principles (Avijja, Lokapala Dhamma, clear seeing, etc.).
Session ends with shared commitment and Sadhu. Community intelligence report is produced.

participant_1.name: Maung Kyaw Hein
participant_1.profile: Gen Z, curious, follows international media, focuses on diplomacy and China-NUG relations

participant_2.name: Maung Zaw Win
participant_2.profile: Gen Z, emotional, easily affected by negative news, seeks emotional balance

participant_3.name: Ma Thiri
participant_3.profile: Young woman, optimistic about resistance resilience, focuses on people's endurance

participant_4.name: Maung Ba Thi
participant_4.profile: Youngest, tech-savvy, interested in information warfare and cyber manipulation

participant_5.name: U Kyan Pwal
participant_5.profile: Eldest, experienced, emphasizes moral steadfastness and long-term vision

participant_6.name: Maung Phyo
participant_6.profile: Balanced, practical, focuses on ground reality and administrative challenges

system_status.purpose: Open-source template for daily civic intelligence practice
